news.headline: Sisecam introduces Plant of the Future initiative at Glasstec 2024 Fair, shaping glass industry.
news.summary: At the Glasstec 2024 Fair, Sisecam, the leading global company in the glass industry, unveiled its innovative Plant of the Future platform. Sisecam, operating in all key facets of glass production, showcased the cutting-edge technology that will shape the future of the industry. This unveiling marks a significant milestone for Sisecam, underscoring its position as a pioneer in the sector.

news.headline: Kia announces pricing for 2025 EV9 three-row EV SUV; Light Long Range trim sees $700 increase.
news.summary: Kia America has revealed the pricing for their 2025 Kia EV9 three-row EV SUV, which has won several awards. The new pricing includes a $700 increase only for the Light Long Range trim, while all other trims remain unchanged. This announcement was made in Irvine, California on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Raymond James Financial (NYSE: RJF) sees record net revenues of $3.46B and net income of $601M in Q4 2024, excluding $25M related expenses.
news.summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) announced today a record-breaking performance for the fiscal fourth quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company reported impressive net revenues of $3.46 billion and net income available to common shareholders reaching $601 million, equivalent to $2.86 per diluted share. Adjusting for acquisition-related expenses totaling $25 million, the adjusted net income available to common shareholders stood at $621 million, or $2.95 per diluted share.

news.headline: Nov. 31, 2024: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. to host conference call to discuss Q3 results. Call on Oct. 31, 2024, 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET).
news.summary: NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. is set to hold a conference call on Thursday, October 31, 2024, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET) to review their performance in the third quarter of 2024. The discussion will follow the release of their Q3 earnings report the night before the call. The company, trading on NASDAQ under NCSM, aims to provide insight into their financial results during this session.

news.headline: Zurn Elkay Water Solutions boosts quarterly dividend by 12.5%, from $0.40 to $0.45.
news.summary: Recently, a report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.5%. The report also showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, average hourly earnings saw a notable increase of 2.5%, indicating positive growth in the labor market. The improved job market conditions are expected to have a positive impact on consumer spending and overall economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPFI) reports Q3 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In Lubbock, Texas, South Plains Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ:SPFI) announced their quarterly financial results for the period ending September 30, 2024. South Plains is the parent company of City Bank. The report outlined the performance of the company during this period.

news.headline: Textron CFO Frank Connor to retire by Feb 28, 2025. David Rosenberg to take over as CFO from March 1, 2025.
news.summary: Textron Inc. stated that Frank T. Connor, their EVP and CFO, plans to retire on February 28, 2025. David Rosenberg, the current VP of Investor Relations, will take over as the new EVP and CFO from March 1, 2025. The retirement announcement was made today. Textron Inc. is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol 'TXT'. This change in leadership marks a significant transition for the company's financial department.

news.headline: Pearson and ServiceNow join forces to enhance workforce development and employee experiences in the AI era.
news.summary: Pearson and ServiceNow have joined forces to enhance workforce development and improve employee experiences in the era of AI. This collaboration between the London-based Pearson and Santa Clara, California-based ServiceNow aims to leverage technology to enhance employee training and support. By combining Pearson's expertise in education with ServiceNow's innovative solutions, the partnership seeks to revolutionize workforce development. This collaboration promises to bring significant advancements in employee learning and experiences in the age of AI.

news.headline: ServiceNow & Rimini Street collaborate on new software model to enhance ERP systems for innovation & growth.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow has announced a collaboration with Rimini Street to introduce a novel enterprise software approach aimed at extracting value from current ERP systems. This partnership aims to revolutionize the industry by leveraging existing software.

news.headline: ServiceNow appoints Amit Zavery as President, CPO, and COO to lead product and engineering. Joining on Oct 28, 2024, he's a Google Cloud and Oracle veteran with 30+ years of enterprise experience.
news.summary: ServiceNow, a leading AI platform for business transformation, has revealed that Amit Zavery will assume the roles of president, chief product officer (CPO), and chief operating officer (COO) from October 28, 2024. Zavery, an experienced executive from Google Cloud and Oracle, will be responsible for overseeing product and engineering at the company. With over 30 years in the enterprise software industry, he is expected to bring valuable expertise in innovation, transformation, and scaling strategies. ServiceNow, listed on NYSE as NOW, continues to strengthen its leadership team with this strategic appointment.

news.headline: ServiceNow's Q3 2024: Subscription revenues of $2,715 million, 23% y-o-y growth. CEO raises full year guidance.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) unveiled its financial results for Q3 2024, ending on September 30. The company reported subscription revenues reaching $2,715 million, marking a 23% year-over-year growth and 22.5% in constant currency. Bill McDermott, ServiceNow's Chairman and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the results, mentioning that the company exceeded expectations. Consequently, ServiceNow has raised its full-year topline guidance.

news.headline: Beware: Crypto address poisoning scams on the rise, targeting high-value users by mimicking familiar transaction addresses. (More info)
news.summary: Scammers are increasingly using address poisoning schemes to target high-value individuals in the cryptocurrency industry. These scams involve replicating common transaction addresses to deceive victims. The prevalence of these scams poses a major threat to security in the industry.

news.headline: St. Joe Co. announces Q3 and first 9 months 2024 results, declares $0.14 quarterly dividend. #JOE
news.summary: Panama City Beach, Florida - The St. Joe Company has released its financial results for the third quarter and first nine months of 2024, along with announcing a quarterly dividend of $0.14 per share.

news.headline: John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. schedule Q1 FY2025 conference call for Oct. 31, 2024, following the release of results on Oct. 30, 2024.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Elgin, IL, John B. Sanfilippo & Son, Inc. (NASDAQ: JBSS), a leading snack and recipe nut product processor and distributor, as well as snack bar manufacturer, has announced that it will host a quarterly conference call to review its first quarter fiscal year 2025 operational performance. The results for the first quarter of fiscal 2025 are anticipated to be made public after the market closes on Wednesday, October 30, 2024.

news.headline: DT Cloud Acquisition Corp. and Maius Pharmaceutical signed a merger deal as Maius will be owned by Pubco, securities to be listed on Nasdaq.
news.summary: DT Cloud Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: DYCQU, DYCQ, DYCQR) and Maius Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. have announced a definitive business combination agreement for a merger transaction. Following the agreement, Maius will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of Maius Pharmaceutical Group Co., Ltd., a new holding company listed on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The deal, known as the Business Combination, involves transactions associated with the merger. The announcement was made in New York on Oct. 23, 2024.

news.headline: A live concert of "A Charlie Brown Christmas" celebrating Peanuts, 1965 classic, and Vince Guaraldi's music in Stowe, VT. Tickets on sale now.
news.summary: Exciting concert production commemorating Charles M. Schulz's iconic "Peanuts" comic strip, the 1965 holiday classic special, and Vince Guaraldi's musical score is now available for purchase. Taking place in Stowe, VT on October 23, 2024, the event is hosted at Spruce Peak, a deluxe slopeside community in Vermont. Tickets for this unique celebration are currently on sale.

news.headline: Trimble (Nasdaq: TRMB) to discuss Q3 2024 results on Nov 6 at 8am ET. Webcast available at investor.trimble.com.

The call will be available for live streaming on their investor website at http://investor.trimble.com. For investors without internet access, alternative arrangements will be made.

In line with this disclosure, Tesla will conduct a live question and answer webcast on Wednesday, October 23, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. CT (5:30 p.m. ET) to discuss the outcomes and future prospects. news.headline: Penske Automotive Group to acquire third Porsche dealership in Melbourne, Australia, marking 25th worldwide.
news.summary: Penske Automotive Group, Inc. (NYSE: PAG) recently acquired a new Porsche location in Melbourne, marking their third establishment in the city and 25th worldwide. This Michigan-based company is a renowned international transportation services provider and a leading player in the automotive industry. The acquisition, finalized on October 23, 2024, signals Penske's further expansion in the luxury car market.

(NYSE: FNF), a prominent company in the field, presented itself as a top player in offering title insurance and transaction services to the real estate and mortgage sectors, as well as providing insurance solutions for retail annuities and life policies.

news.headline: 2024 Q3 financial results for Mattel show improved profitability, expanded Gross Margin, and significant cash flow with expectations of Q4 growth.
news.summary: Toy company Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) based in El Segundo, California, has released its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The Chairman and CEO, Ynon Kreiz, stated that they are making progress in their strategy to enhance their IP-focused toy business and broaden their entertainment portfolio. The company is focused on improving profitability, increasing Gross Margin, and producing substantial cash flow. Anticipated growth in the fourth quarter is driven by the approaching holiday season.

news.summary: Traeger, Inc. (NYSE: COOK), a prominent company in the wood pellet grill industry, is set to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2024. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (833) 470-1428, or for international participants, by dialing +1 (929) 526-1599.

news.headline: $IBM IBM Q3 2024 Earnings

EastGroup Properties reported Q3 2024 with $1.13 diluted EPS (up from $1.07 in Q3 2023) and FFO at $2.13 (9.2% increase from $1.95 in Q3 2023). Operations reflected positive metrics, including an increase in net operating income, leasing rates, and acquisitions. The company is optimistic about growth opportunities, showcasing strong financials, and dividends.
news.summary: EastGroup Properties, Inc. reported its financial highlights for the third quarter of 2024, including a net income attributable to common stockholders of $1.13 per diluted share, a 9.2% increase in Funds from Operations (FFO) excluding specific gains, and a 5.5% increase in Same Property Net Operating Income for the same property pool. The operating portfolio was 96.9% leased and 96.5% occupied as of September 30, 2024. They acquired an operating property of 179,000 square feet for $36 million and started construction on two development projects totaling 310,000 square feet with projected costs of $40 million. They transferred three development projects totaling 735,000 square feet to the operating portfolio. The CEO, Marshall Loeb, expressed optimism about the company's performance and growth prospects. Dividends are up, with a 10.2% increase over the previous quarter. The company maintains a strong balance sheet and completed various financial transactions during the quarter. Projections for 2024 include an estimated EPS range of $4.64 to $4.68 and FFO per share range of $8.33 to $8.37. More details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Waste Connections reported Q3 2024 results with revenue at $2.338 billion (up 13.3% YoY), net income of $308.0 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $787.4 million (up 17.3% YoY). The company raised full-year outlook to $8.9 billion revenue, $1.082 billion net income, and $2.91 billion adjusted EBITDA. Operating income was $475.3 million for the quarter. Employee retention improved with voluntary turnover down over the quarter. The company anticipates high single-digit EBITDA growth in 2025. Joint revenue contribution in 2025 from acquisitions in 2024 is expected at 2%. Dividend increased by 10.5%. Further information available at Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Waste Connections, Inc. reported better than expected third-quarter results with revenue reaching $2.338 billion, a 13.3% YoY increase. Net income was $308 million and adjusted EBITDA was $787.4 million, up 17.3% YoY. Adjusted EBITDA margin was 33.7%, a 120 basis point increase from the previous year. The company also raised its full-year 2024 outlook to $8.9 billion in revenue, with net income expected to be $1.082 billion and adjusted EBITDA of $2.91 billion. The company increased its regular quarterly dividend by 10.5% and is on track for acquisitions totaling over $700 million in annual revenue. Employee retention improved, with expectations of high single-digit adjusted EBITDA growth in 2025. The company plans to provide a fourth-quarter outlook on revenue and adjusted EBITDA on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: IBM announced Q3 2024 results: revenue $15.0B (up 1%), Software revenue up 10%, Gross Profit Margin at 57.5%, $9.1B net cash, $6.6B free cash flow. Growth in AI sector with $3B generative AI book. Loss from continuing operations at $0.3B. Expenses: S,G&A $14.8B, R,D&E $5.5B._DISCLAIMER: This is a summarized version of the news article.
news.summary: IBM reported strong third-quarter 2024 earnings, with revenue reaching $15.0 billion, up 1% and up 2% at constant currency. Software revenue saw a 10% increase, contributing significantly to the overall growth. Gross profit margin improved to 56.3%, up 190 basis points. Free cash flow for the year was projected to exceed $12 billion. Software segment revenue was $6.5 billion, up 9.7%, led by growth in AI and Red Hat. Cash flow from operating activities was $2.9 billion for the quarter, with free cash flow at $2.1 billion. The company returned $1.5 billion to shareholders in dividends during the quarter. IBM ended the quarter with $13.7 billion in cash and securities. The company projected constant currency revenue growth for the fourth quarter, with currency expected to be a small headwind. Free cash flow for the full year was anticipated to surpass $12 billion. These positive results were driven by strong momentum in Software and AI, reflecting IBM's effective business strategies.

news.headline: SouthState Corp (SSB) reveals Q3 2024 results; unaudited financial info for three-month & nine-month(hurricane challenges) period ended Sep 30.
news.summary: In Winter Haven, Florida on October 23, 2024, SouthState Corporation (NYSE: SSB) disclosed its unaudited financial data for the three-month and nine-month periods concluding on September 30, 2024. The company highlighted its performance amidst the difficulties faced during hurricane season.

news.headline: Century Communities reports strong Q3 2024 results with $1.1 billion in home sales revenue, 2,834 homes delivered, 2,563 net new contracts, and 305 communities—a 29%, 25%, 19%, and 21% YoY increase, respectively.
news.summary: In Greenwood Village, Colorado, on October 23, 2024, Century reported significant growth in their home sales with revenues reaching $1.1 billion, a 29% year-over-year increase. The number of home deliveries also saw a substantial uptick, reaching 2,834 homes, a 25% increase from the previous year. Additionally, there was a 19% year-over-year increase in net new home contracts, totaling 2,563. The company set a new record with a community count of 305, marking a 21% increase from the previous year.

news.headline: Arcadium Lithium to release Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 7, 2024, after market close. NYSE: ALTM, ASX: LTM.

This information will be shared through PR Newswire and the company's official channels. Arcadium Lithium is listed on both NYSE (with the ticker symbol ALTM) and ASX (with the ticker symbol LTM).

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics reports Q3 2024 results, plans for obesity drug trials, NASH/MASH study presentation. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: A conference call is set for today at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss the upcoming End-of-Phase 2 Meeting for Subcutaneous VK2735 intended for obesity, scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2024. Moreover, the Phase 2 study for Oral VK2735 targeting obesity is projected to commence in the fourth quarter of 2024. Additionally, the outcomes from the Phase 2b VOYAGE Study of VK2809 focusing on NASH/MASH with fibrosis have been chosen for an oral presentation.

news.headline: Local PBS stations in New York and New Jersey launch "Your Election 2024" program to inform viewers before November elections.
news.summary: Ahead of the upcoming November elections in 2024, The WNET Group based in New York will be launching Your Election 2024, a comprehensive platform aimed at keeping the public informed and prepared for voting. Through a variety of programs and resources accessible at thirteen.org/YourElection2024, this initiative will offer insights into crucial election topics and facilitate voter readiness.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands Q3 2024: Net Revenue $2.68B, Net Income $353M. EBITDA $991M (Consolidated), $585M (Macao). Low Hold affected EBITDA.

news.headline: Align Technology reported Q3'24 total revenues of $977.9 million, down 4.9% sequentially and up 1.8% year-over-year.
news.summary: Align Technology, Inc., a major medical device company trading on Nasdaq under the symbol ALGN, has released their financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The total revenues for Q3'24 amounted to $977.9 million, showing a 4.9% decrease from the previous quarter but a 1.8% increase from the same period last year. Align Technology is known for its Invisalign® System, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software which are used in digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry.

news.headline: Allison Transmission increases market share globally in wheeled defense vehicles, expecting growth in installed base and revenue.
news.summary: Allison Transmission, located in Indianapolis, has reported major progress in the worldwide Defense sector as of October 23, 2024. news.headline: EQT surpasses goal to reach net zero Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions ahead of 2025 target.
news.summary: PITTSBURGH, October 23, 2024 - EQT Corporation, a prominent natural gas producer in the US identified by the NYSE as EQT, has become the inaugural large-scale traditional energy producer globally to successfully attain net-zero greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions for both Scope 1 and Scope 2. This milestone reflects EQT's dedication to environmental sustainability and signifies a significant achievement in the industry.

news.headline: Frank Quinn rejoining Align Technology as EVP & Managing Director of Americas Region, a leading global medical device company.

Align is known for its Invisalign® System of clear aligners, iTero™ intraoral scanners, and exocad™ CAD/CAM software for digital orthodontics and restorative dentistry.

news.headline: Pega Cloud growth boosts Q3 2024 results, CEO Alan Trefler excited about GenAI Blueprint's impact on clients.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Pegasystems Inc. (NASDAQ: PEGA) has unveiled its financial outcomes for Q3 of 2024. Trefler praised Pega's innovative AI strategy for aiding clients in hastening digital transformation towards achieving genuine autonomous enterprise status.
